log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Dhampir — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:20+3=23 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 13casting_mod force damage. Dhampir — Bardic Musician HP: NaN/67
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Dhampir — Bardic Musician.
→ Dhampir — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:16+6=22 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):3+1=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.

REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
